name: Santana Beach Club & Restaurant
whyFit: Weekly live bands, sunset sessions. Family-run since 2009.

name: Yazoo Summer Bliss
whyFit: Boho beach vibe, full moon parties with live music on sand.

name: Rum Bar
whyFit: Eclectic venue (blues, jazz, reggae) with harbor sunset views. Owner Yiannis curates personally.

name: Sativa Café & Live Music Bar
whyFit: Best genre fit in Cyclades — purpose-built live music venue. Lounge, funk, reggae, electronic.

name: Crios Beach Bar & Restaurant
whyFit: Upscale boho-chic, new venue (2024) still building identity. Mindfulness brand.

name: BeBop Bar
whyFit: One of few Cycladic bars with listening atmosphere. Jazz-friendly, sunset views.

name: Old Captain Bar
whyFit: Regular live music 3x/week. Multi-week residencies possible. Food/culture tourists.

name: Palmira Beach Bar
whyFit: Sifnos most iconic beach bar since 2005. Chill-out but upbeat.

name: Soros Beach
whyFit: Bohemian-luxury. Already features sax + DJ. Steel tongue drum would be novel.

name: Ammos & Ilios Beach Bar
whyFit: One of Chania most popular beach bars. Target sunset aperitivo window 6-8 PM.

name: Liokalyvo Beach Club
whyFit: Tulum-inspired. Music rituals events. Harmonizing soul with waves.

name: Cretan Malia Park
whyFit: Eco-boutique hotel. Earthy and boho aesthetic. Pool area performances.

name: Ekies All Senses Resort
whyFit: Barefoot luxury with treehouse restaurant. Renovated 2025. Refreshing entertainment.

name: Arillas Soundgarden
whyFit: Self-described mecca of ecstatic dance. 1200sqm olive grove. Books Adrian Atma, Yemanjo.

name: Ecstatic Radiance
whyFit: Pillar of Ecstatic Dance in Greece. Sound healing + gong baths. Harmonia Festival October.

name: Casa Cook Rhodes
whyFit: Multi-property brand. Getting into one opens entire Mediterranean portfolio.

name: Chiringuito Ohana
whyFit: Daily sunset sessions. Explicitly avoids reggaeton. World music, acoustic, organic sounds.

name: Chiringuito El Pez Limón
whyFit: Famous for sunset concerts. Hosted world music artists.

name: Chiringuito La Luna
whyFit: Daily free sunset performances from 20:00. Owner Antonio produces Afro House.

name: Hurricane Beach Bar
whyFit: Elegant setting under pine trees with views of Morocco. Quality over quantity.

name: Grupo Potito Beach Club
whyFit: Professional operation, multiple venues. Live music praised on TripAdvisor.

name: Chiringuito El Hornillero
whyFit: Last virgin beach of Costa del Sol. Live music specialty. Authentic, intimate.

name: Rincón del Sol
whyFit: Premium beach club. Asian-fusion. Chill-out sofas + mood lighting.

name: La Siesta Javea
whyFit: Forbes-listed chiringuito. Bohemian-luxe. 52K IG followers. Massive exposure.
bookingWindow: IG DM or Guest Experience team

name: The Beach House Javea
whyFit: Repsol Solete-awarded. Ibiza meets Morocco decor. Intimate, quality-focused.

name: Xiringuito X
location: Playa de la Rubina, Costa Brava
whyFit: Since 1996, THE musical chiringuito of Costa Brava. Nature park setting.

name: Blue Bar Formentera
whyFit: Iconic 30+ year hippie beach bar. Monday live music night. Cosmic bohemian ethos.

name: Es Xiringuito Ibiza
whyFit: Daily music: tropical, bossa, chill out, jazz. NOT a mega-club. Genuine chiringuito.

name: Can Jordi Blues Station
location: Ibiza Town to San José Road, Ibiza
whyFit: Local legend. Countryside grocery/bar hosting live music. Intimate, authentic.

name: Ecstatic Dance Ibiza Tribe
whyFit: Ibiza conscious community. 280sqm dance floor. Tags Live Music as category.

name: Dreamsea Mediterranean
whyFit: Glamping resort. Yoga, sustainability. 14 camps worldwide — multi-venue potential.

name: Nautic Almata Camping
whyFit: Beach Club transforms into cocktail bar with live music evenings.

name: Sunset Café Capilungo
whyFit: Most beautiful sunset in Salento. Wooden-deck on rocks over the Ionian.

name: XXL Music Bistrot
whyFit: Identity IS live music. Nearly nightly AperiLive events. Jazz, funk, Latin.

name: Canneto Beach
whyFit: Panoramic cocktail bar, Japanese cuisine. Wedding venue too.

name: Belvedere Music Beach
whyFit: Music in the name. DJs + Live Music Shows + Private Events.

name: Petra Nera
whyFit: Heart of Salento tourism. Many live events. Ionian waterfront.

name: Lido Kalé Cora
whyFit: Special focus on live music with exceptional artists. Rocky coastline.

name: La Casa degli Uccellini
whyFit: Traditional stone aia under stars. Bio-philosophy. Opens doors to Valle d'Itria masseria circuit.

name: Masseria Tenuta Flora Maria
whyFit: Poolbar overlooking vineyard under starry sky. Twice weekly aperitifs with live music.

name: Agriturismo Terra di Lizia
whyFit: Hosted international jazz/world musicians. Cena e musica dal vivo format. Multi-night residency.

name: Masseria Amastuola
whyFit: Terrazza overlooking vineyards. Wine & Sound evening concept.

name: Note di Vino
whyFit: Built on wine and music marriage. Weekly concerts + jam sessions. Stage provided.

name: Mamma Elvira Enoteca
whyFit: 250+ wines, Baroque stone setting. Owner Andrea values collaboration.

name: Maljk Beach Club
whyFit: Cefalù most famous beach venue. Balinese-style thatched pavilion.

name: Pub Troubadour 1982
whyFit: Since 1982. Intimate courtyard. Hidden gem. Aperitivi con musica dal vivo.

name: Mammut Wine Bar
whyFit: Every Friday and Saturday evening. Over-30 crowd. Wine and music passion.

name: Resort Le Saline
whyFit: BEST-MATCHED VENUE. Explicitly seeks acoustic performers for sunset sessions 2-3x/week.

name: Torre del Porticciolo Camping Village
whyFit: NEEDS 6 musical evenings/week Jul-Aug. Multi-week residency potential.

name: Camping Cala Ginepro
whyFit: Plethora of concerts and live music. Diverse programming incl Sardinian folk.

name: Sunset Beach Club Tropea
whyFit: Panoramic view of Aeolian Islands. Smaller live scene = less competition.

name: Laundry Lounge Sagres
whyFit: Best live music in Sagres. Yoga studio mornings, surf culture. Blues/reggae/bossa.

name: Three Little Birds
whyFit: Surfers, travelers, conscious crowd. Combine with Laundry Lounge for Sagres residency.

name: Stevie Ray's Music Bar
whyFit: Lonely Planet best live-music bar. International artists from Amsterdam to Mozambique.

name: Gigi's Bar Quinta do Lago
whyFit: Sunset Sessions with acoustic sounds. Crossed by long wooden bridge over lagoon.

name: Julia's Beach Bar
whyFit: Sunday lunchtime sessions year-round. Independently run. Two-level layout.

name: O Cais Restaurant & Wine Bar
whyFit: Riverside setting, ancient Roman bridge backdrop. Culturally-inclined crowd.

name: Ecstatic Dance Algarve
whyFit: Perfect fit. Medicine songs, sound healing, drum circles. Past events featured handpan.

name: The Shanti Space
whyFit: Cork tree forest. Cacao ceremonies + ecstatic dance. Sound baths. RAV Vast = transcendent.

name: Ohai Nazaré Outdoor Resort
whyFit: Pine forest glamping. Surf crowd. Gateway to Portuguese circuit.

name: Central Park Club
whyFit: Best fit in Croatia. Live music 7 DAYS A WEEK Apr-Sep. Jazz, soul, blues. 85 seats.

name: Valentino Cocktail & Champagne Bar
whyFit: Café del Mar of Croatia. Golden pillows on rocks, underwater lights. National Geographic featured.

name: Beach Bar Rovinj
whyFit: Live music most nights. Family-run, extremely friendly owner. Old town views.

name: Circolo Bar
whyFit: Best off-season option. Local favorite. Weekend live music.

name: Marvlvs Library Jazz Bar
whyFit: CULT venue. Ancient stone walls, library shelves. Bridges literature and music.

name: Ecstatic Dance Croatia
whyFit: Mystical atmospheres + ethnic elements. Similar to FLUTUR sound. Growing community.

name: Scarlett Entertainment
whyFit: 22,600+ acts. Dedicated Italian account manager Giovanni. Café del Mar-style bookings.

name: Ibiza Music Agency
whyFit: Ibiza-based. Hotel entertainment. Jazz Point Ibiza events.

name: La Bottega della Musica
whyFit: 30+ years. Lake Como, Tuscany, Amalfi, Sardinia luxury weddings.

name: Musicastrada Booking
whyFit: World music agency. Folk/ethnic + modern + electronics. Attends WOMEX.

name: Remarc Sunseafun
whyFit: Largest Hotel Entertainment Company in Southern Europe. 700+ entertainers yearly.

name: Elastic Lounge Entertainment
whyFit: Hotel entertainment specialist. Solo acts for residencies. Discreet sophistication.

name: Talents & Productions
whyFit: Monaco-based. Spain, Turkey, France. Original performing arts. Corporate/luxury.
